project.name: Versatility Campaign (One Flavor, Four Ways)
project.description: Paid media push telling Teeccino's versatility story — 4 hero flavors (French Roast, Adapt & Protect, Dandelion Dark Roast, Mocha) × 4 formats (Full-Grind Coffee / Tee-Bags / Maya Instant Coffee / Maya Instant Latte). 16 SKUs in scope. $15K over 31 days (2026-05-04 → 2026-06-03), Meta 80% / Google 20%. Budget reallocated from Meta COLD. KPI: account-level MER floor ≥ 6.0x. Inaugural test of AdSmith's campaign-planning skill — first Teeccino campaign tracked end-to-end as a project (brief → creative → launch → optimize → post-mortem).

milestones.label: M1: Brief locked — objectives, KPIs, target audience(s), hero flavors, format matrix, platforms, budget envelope, timeline, success criteria
M2: Creative matrix built — products × formats × platforms × angles + ad copy variants (Google RSAs + Meta primary/headline/description) + A/B test hypotheses
M3: Creative assets delivered — multi-format flavor photography (AssetSmith), static ad images sized per platform, any video cuts. Assets in campaign folder.
M4: Landing destinations ready — PDPs / collection pages / custom LP if needed (ThemeSmith or Shopkeeper). UTMs defined. Tracking events verified.
M5: Pre-launch checklist complete — conversion tracking verified, audiences built, budget guardrails set, naming convention applied, Justin approves launch
M6: Launch — campaigns live on Google + Meta (via campaign-ops skill, propose → approve → execute → verify pattern)
M7: Week 1 pacing review — spend vs plan, early creative winners/losers, any emergency adjustments (auto-flag >20% pacing variance)
M8: Week 2-4 optimization — budget reallocation within campaign, creative rotation, audience refinement, A/B test calls
M9: Post-mortem — final metrics vs plan, creative learnings, what worked/didn't, add to AdSmith learnings register for future campaigns

tasks.description: Fill in campaign brief template (objectives, KPIs, audience, budget, timeline) — interactive session with Justin
Decide hero flavors (3-4 max) and format matrix — which flavors are available in which of the 4 formats?
Decide platforms (Google, Meta, or both) and rough budget split
Decide source of funding — net-new budget or reallocation from Meta COLD losses (~$5.4K/mo)
Build creative matrix — rows: hero flavors × formats; cols: platforms × ad types. Each cell: angle/hook/copy variant.
Draft Google RSA headline/description variants per hero flavor (15 headlines, 4 descriptions each)
Draft Meta primary text + headline + description variants per hero flavor
Define A/B test hypotheses (one variable per test, 95% significance target)
Check existing photography inventory — does AssetSmith have multi-format hero shots for selected flavors?
Dispatch any missing photography needs to AssetSmith (brief: flavor + formats + platform sizes)
Produce platform-sized static image exports (Meta Feed 1080, Stories 1080x1920, Google 1200x628, 1200x1200)
Define landing destinations per ad (PDP / collection / custom LP) and UTM scheme (utm_campaign=versatility-2026-q2)
Verify conversion tracking fires end-to-end (Google gtag + Meta pixel purchase events)
If custom LP needed: dispatch spec to ThemeSmith
Run pre-launch checklist (all items green)
Present launch-ready package to Justin (brief + creatives + budget + timeline + tracking). Get explicit go/no-go.
Launch via campaign-ops skill (Google + Meta). Verify campaigns show ACTIVE in both UIs.
Week 1 pacing report — spend vs plan, early CTR/CVR/CPA/ROAS read
Week 2 optimization — promote winning creatives, pause weakest, shift budget within campaign
Post-mortem document — final metrics vs plan, learnings register update

docs.desc: Campaign brief (filled in during M1 with Justin)
Go/no-go gate before campaigns go live
Plan vs actual KPI tracking (updated weekly)
AdSmith skill documenting the full campaign lifecycle workflow

audience.google: Similar audiences + in-market coffee alternatives + brand-defense search
